Class-Ranger 20 — Female Human Ranger: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 18 (+4) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 10 (+0) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 3; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 817147/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Roving: +10 Speed; heavy armor negates
Ability Boosts: 6 to distribute
Roving: Has 40' climb and swim Speeds
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; Fighting Style: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Ranger (Ranger Fighting Style); Ranger (Ranger Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery; Boon Of Spell Recall; Great Weapon Fighting; Savage Attacker; Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Ranger Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Defensive Tactics; Deft Explorer; Druidic Warrior; Epic Boon; Expertise; Extra Attack; Favored Enemy; Feral Senses; Fighting Style; Foe Slayer; Hunter's Lore; Hunter's Prey; Hunter; Nature's Veil; Precise Hunter; Ranger Fighting Style; Ranger Subclass; Relentless Hunter; Roving; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival); Spellcasting; Superior Hunter's Defense; Superior Hunter's Prey; Tireless; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Ranger Fighting Style: 1 selection
Ranger Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +10 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +0 Intimidation: (cha) +15 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +13 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +6
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Arcana; Athletics; Insight; Intimidation; Nature; Religion; Survival
Expertise: Intimidation; Nature
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Celestial; Common; Dwarvish; Infernal; Orc
Skill Notes:
Deft Explorer: Language (Choose 2 from any)
Expertise: +6 on 2 chosen proficient skills
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Deft Explorer: +6 on a choice of proficient skill
Feral Senses: Has 30' Blindsight
Combat
Hit Points: 68 Initiative: +10 Armor Class: 15
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Longbow (+10 1d8+4 P R150/600; Slow); Sickle (+6 1d4 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+6 1 B); Whip (+10 1d4+4 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Defensive Tactics: Has the Escape The Horde and Multiattack Defense features
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Hunter's Prey: Has the Colossus Slayer and Horde Breaker features
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Colossus Slayer: Can inflict +1d8 HP with a weapon vs. an already-injured foe once per turn
Defensive Tactics: Can choose Escape The Horde or Multiattack Defense to be active after each rest
Escape The Horde: Foes have disadvantage on opportunity attacks targeting self
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Horde Breaker: Can make a second weapon attack on a different adjacent foe once per turn
Hunter's Lore: Knows any immunities, resistances, or vulnerabilities of a Hunter's Mark target
Hunter's Prey: Can choose to have Colossus Slayer or Horde Breaker active after each rest
Multiattack Defense: Successful attackers suffer disadvantage on additional attacks on self in the same turn
Nature's Veil: Can use a bonus action to become invisible until the end of the next turn once per long rest
Precise Hunter: Has advantage on attacks vs. Hunter's Mark target
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Tireless: Can use an action to gain 1d8+1 temporary hit points once per long rest
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +10; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +6; Wisdom: +0
Save Notes:
Superior Hunter's Defense: Can use a reaction upon taking damage to gain resistance to that type of damage until the end of the current turn
Tireless: Exhaustion level decreases by 1 after a short rest
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: R: 15 Spell Slots: D0: 2; R1: 4; R2: 3; R3: 3; R4: 3; R5: 2 Attack: C: +6; R: +6 Spell DC: C: 14; R: 14
Spells:
Barkskin (R2 Tran): Willing touched gains Armor Class 17 for 1 hr
Commune With Nature (R5 Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): 10' emanation inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Cure Wounds (R1 Evoc): 1
Daylight (R3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Freedom Of Movement (R4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 40' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Hunter's Mark (R1 [Favored Enemy] Divi): R90' Self inflicts +1d10 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points [+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5]
Jump (R1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Locate Creature (R4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (R1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Nondetection (R3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Pass Without Trace (R2 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (R3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Poison (R2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Speak With Animals (R1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): Allows self to use 10' of movement to teleport 500' between like trees once per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Druidic Warrior: Knows 2 Druid cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Ranger level
Foe Slayer: Has increased Hunter's Mark effects
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Favored Enemy: Can cast Hunter's Mark 6 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Relentless Hunter: Damage does not break concentration on Hunter's Mark
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the ranger spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Superior Hunter's Prey: Can inflict Hunter's Mark damage to a second creature within 30' of the target once per turn
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 2 available vs. 3 allocated
